command.zos.access-endpoint.list.descrip: List endpoints for accessible ZOS regions. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.assessment.create.descriptio: Create an object-storage assessment task. Supported in East China 1. A user can create at most five free assessment tasks.
command.zos.assessment.delete.descriptio: Delete an object-storage assessment task. Supported in East China 1. Only a paused, assessment-failed, or assessment-completed task can be deleted.
command.zos.assessment.list.description: List object-storage assessment tasks. Supported in East China 1.
command.zos.assessment.pause.description: Pause an object-storage assessment task. Supported in East China 1. Only a queued or assessing task can be paused.
command.zos.assessment.resume.descriptio: Resume an object-storage assessment task. Supported in East China 1. Only a paused task can be resumed.
command.zos.assessment.show.description: Retrieve an object-storage assessment task. Supported in East China 1.
command.zos.assessment.start.description: Start an object-storage assessment task. Supported in East China 1. Only a task in assessment-failed or assessment-completed state can be started.
command.zos.bucket-acl.set.description: Set the access control list for a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-acl.show.description: Retrieve the access control list for a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-cors.delete.descripti: Delete the cross-origin resource sharing policy from a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-cors.set.description: Set the cross-origin resource sharing policy for a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-cors.show.description: Retrieve the cross-origin resource sharing policy for a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-encryption.delete.des: Delete the server-side encryption configuration from a bucket. Supported online regions: Inner Mongolia6、Beijing5、North China2、South China2、Nanjing3、Nanning23、Nanchang5、Hefei2、Changzhou69、Wuhan41、Fuzhou25、Southwest China1、Changsha42.
command.zos.bucket-encryption.set.descri: Set server-side encryption for a bucket. Supported online regions: Inner Mongolia6、Beijing5、North China2、South China2、Nanjing3、Nanning23、Nanchang5、Hefei2、Changzhou69、Wuhan41、Fuzhou25、Southwest China1、Changsha42.
command.zos.bucket-encryption.show.descr: Retrieve the server-side encryption configuration for a bucket. Supported online regions: Inner Mongolia6、Beijing5、North China2、South China2、Nanjing3、Nanning23、Nanchang5、Hefei2、Changzhou69、Wuhan41、Fuzhou25、Southwest China1、Changsha42.
command.zos.bucket-event-bridge.set.desc: Set the event-bridge state for a bucket. Supported in East China 1.
command.zos.bucket-lifecycle.delete.desc: Delete the lifecycle configuration from a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-lifecycle.set.descrip: Set the lifecycle configuration for a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-lifecycle.show.descri: Retrieve the lifecycle configuration for a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-logging.delete.descri: Delete the logging configuration from a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-logging.set.descripti: Set the logging configuration for a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-logging.show.descript: Retrieve the logging configuration for a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-object-lock.set.descr: Set the compliance retention policy for a bucket. Supported in Shanghai 7, Shanghai 32, and Shanghai 36. Compliance retention must have been enabled when the bucket was created.
command.zos.bucket-object-lock.show.desc: Retrieve the compliance retention policy for a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-policy.delete.descrip: Delete the access policy from a bucket. Supported online regions: Shanghai32.
command.zos.bucket-policy.set.descriptio: Set the access policy for a bucket. Supported online regions: Shanghai7、Nanjing3、Nanjing5、Hangzhou2、Hefei2、Jiujiang、Guangzhou6、Wuhan4、Fuzhou25、Xiamen3、Chenzhou2、Haikou2、Beijing5、Xiongan2、Shijiazhuang20、Inner Mongolia6、Jinzhong、Liaoyang1、Xi'an5、Urumqi4、Urumqi27、Zhongwei5、Lanzhou2、Xining2、Lhasa3、Kunming2、Chongqing2、Chengdu4、Guizhou3、Shanghai33、Ningbo Edge Cloud、East China1、Shanghai36、Nanchang5、Qingdao20、Wuhan41、Changsha42、Changsha37、Nanning23、Beijing Industry Cloud20、North China2、Southwest China1、Shanghai32.
command.zos.bucket-policy.show.descripti: Retrieve the access policy for a bucket. Supported online regions: Shanghai32.
command.zos.bucket-quota.set.description: Set the capacity quota for a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-replication.delete.de: Stop and delete a bucket replication rule. Supported region pairs are Shanghai 32 and Hangzhou 2, Shanghai 33 and Central SOE Beijing 1, and Shanghai 7 and Hangzhou 2.
command.zos.bucket-replication.list-dest: List destination regions available for bucket replication. Supported region pairs are Shanghai 32 and Hangzhou 2, Shanghai 33 and Central SOE Beijing 1, and Shanghai 7 and Hangzhou 2.
command.zos.bucket-replication.list.desc: List the cross-region replication rules configured for a bucket. Supported region pairs are Shanghai 32 and Hangzhou 2, Shanghai 33 and Central SOE Beijing 1, and Shanghai 7 and Hangzhou 2.
command.zos.bucket-replication.set.descr: Set a cross-region replication rule for a bucket. Supported region pairs are Shanghai 32 and Hangzhou 2, Shanghai 33 and Central SOE Beijing 1, and Shanghai 7 and Hangzhou 2. A source bucket can replicate to only one same-named destination bucket in one target region.
command.zos.bucket-replication.show-prog: Retrieve the historical-data synchronization progress for a bucket replication rule. Supported region pairs are Shanghai 32 and Hangzhou 2, Shanghai 33 and Central SOE Beijing 1, and Shanghai 7 and Hangzhou 2.
command.zos.bucket-statistics.show.descr: Retrieve usage statistics for one bucket or every bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool. Statistics cover only the most recent 30 days. For delayed usage aggregation, querying the previous hour at least 30 minutes after the current hour begins improves completeness.
command.zos.bucket-tag.delete.descriptio: Delete the tags from a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-tag.list.description: List the tags on a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-tag.set.description: Set tags on a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket-versioning.set.descri: Enable or suspend versioning for a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool. Object locking must be disabled before bucket versioning can be suspended.
command.zos.bucket-versioning.show.descr: Retrieve the versioning configuration for a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket.check-access.descript: Check whether a bucket exists and is accessible. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket.create.description: Create a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket.delete.description: Delete a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool. The bucket must contain neither objects nor fragments left by multipart uploads.
command.zos.bucket.list.description: List buckets in a region. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket.show-fragment-count.d: Retrieve the number of multipart fragments in a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket.show-location.descrip: Retrieve the region containing a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket.show-object-count.des: Retrieve the number of non-fragment objects in a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.bucket.show.description: Retrieve basic information and usage data for a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.credential.show.description: Retrieve the access key and secret key for ZOS. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.directory.create.description: Create a directory in a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.directory.delete.description: Delete a directory and the objects it contains. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.migration-agent.create.descr: Create a semi-managed migration agent. Supported in East China 1. A user can create at most five agents unless the quota has been adjusted.
command.zos.migration-agent.delete.descr: Delete a semi-managed migration agent. Supported in East China 1. An agent can be deleted only when it is not bound to a task or has no task being operated on or migrated.
command.zos.migration-agent.list.descrip: List semi-managed migration agents. Supported in East China 1.
command.zos.migration-agent.show-registr: Retrieve the registration code for a semi-managed migration agent. Supported in East China 1. The registration code can be retrieved only for an unregistered agent.
command.zos.migration-failed-object.list: List failed objects for a migration task. Supported in East China 1. Failed objects can be listed only for a fully managed task in migration-completed-with-failures state.
command.zos.migration.create.description: Create an object-storage migration task. Supported in East China 1. The default per-user quota is five fully managed migration tasks and ten semi-managed tasks unless adjusted; one agent accepts at most 50 tasks and runs at most 12 tasks concurrently.
command.zos.migration.delete.description: Delete an object-storage migration task. Supported in East China 1. A task can be deleted only when created, creation-failed, paused, interrupted, completed, completed-with-failures, or agent-disconnected.
command.zos.migration.list.description: List object-storage migration tasks. Supported in East China 1.
command.zos.migration.pause.description: Pause an object-storage migration task. Supported in East China 1. Only a queued or migrating task can be paused; a semi-managed task also requires a connected agent.
command.zos.migration.resume.description: Resume an object-storage migration task. Supported in East China 1. Only a paused or interrupted task can be resumed; a semi-managed task also requires a connected agent with at least one available worker.
command.zos.migration.retry.description: Retry a failed object-storage migration task. Supported in East China 1. Only a task in migration-completed-with-failures state can be retried; a semi-managed task also requires a connected agent with at least one available worker.
command.zos.migration.show-history.descr: Retrieve the history of an object-storage migration task. Supported in East China 1.
command.zos.migration.show.description: Retrieve an object-storage migration task. Supported in East China 1.
command.zos.migration.start.description: Start an object-storage migration task. Supported in East China 1. Only a completed or completed-with-failures task can be started; a semi-managed task also requires a connected agent with at least one available worker.
command.zos.multipart-fragment.list.desc: List multipart-upload fragments in a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.multipart-upload-part.list.d: List all uploaded parts for a multipart upload. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.multipart-upload.abort.descr: Abort a multipart upload. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool. Parts already in flight may still succeed, so aborting more than once may be necessary to release every part.
command.zos.multipart-upload.complete.de: Complete a multipart upload. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool. Every part except the last must be at least 5 MB, every entry in parts must exist and match, and an aborted or already completed upload cannot be completed.
command.zos.multipart-upload.create.desc: Initiate a multipart upload. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.multipart-upload.list.descri: List multipart uploads in progress. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object-acl.set.description: Set the access control list for an object. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object-acl.show.description: Retrieve the access control list for an object. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object-download-link.generat: Generate a temporary pre-signed object download link. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object-header.set.descriptio: Set HTTP headers on an object. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object-retention.set.descrip: Set the retention period for an object. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool. Object locking must have been enabled when the bucket was created.
command.zos.object-retention.show.descri: Retrieve the retention period for an object. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object-tag.delete.descriptio: Delete the tags from an object. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object-tag.list.description: List the tags on an object. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object-tag.set.description: Set tags on an object. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
Generate a temporary pre-signed object upload link. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object-version.list.descript: List versions of objects in a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object.batch-delete.descript: Delete multiple objects from a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object.change-storage-type.d: Change the storage type of an object. Supported in Hefei 2, Chengdu 4, Shanghai 36, East China 1, Beijing 5, and Shanghai 7. An archived object must be restored before its storage type is changed.
command.zos.object.check-exists.descript: Check whether an object exists. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object.copy.description: Copy an object from a source path to a destination path. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object.delete.description: Delete an object from a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.object.list.description: List objects in a bucket. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool. Set prefix to a directory name to list that directory recursively; adding delimiter=/ limits contents to files in that directory and returns immediate subdirectories in commonPrefixes.
command.zos.object.unfreeze.description: Restore an archived object temporarily to standard storage. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool and only for GLACIER objects.
command.zos.policy.create.description: Create an access policy. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.policy.delete.description: Delete an access policy. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.policy.list.description: List access policies. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.policy.show.description: Retrieve an access policy. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.policy.update.description: Update an access policy. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.region.list.description: List ZOS regions. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.resource-package.quote.descr: Retrieve the price of a ZOS resource package. Supported in every Tier 1 resource pool.
command.zos.role-policy.bind.description: Bind an access policy to a role. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.role-policy.unbind.descripti: Unbind an access policy from a role. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.role.create.description: Create a role for Security Token Service access. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.role.delete.description: Delete an access role. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket. Every policy must be unbound from the role before the role can be deleted.
command.zos.role.list.description: List access roles. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.role.show.description: Retrieve an access role. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.service.enable.description: Enable ZOS in a region. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.service.show-status.descript: Retrieve the ZOS activation status. Supported regions are listed in the ZOS product capability map; trial access can be requested through a support ticket.
command.zos.user-event-bridge.set.descri: Set the user-level event-bridge state. Supported in East China 1.
command.zos.user-event-bridge.show.descr: Retrieve the user-level event-bridge state. Supported in East China 1.
name: Zettabyte Object Storage
parameter.zos.access-endpoint.list.regio: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.assessment.create.destinat: Destination array whose destinationType defaults to and only supports ZOS.
parameter.zos.assessment.create.evaluati: Unique 4-32 character assessment name containing letters, digits, hyphens, or underscores.
parameter.zos.assessment.create.region.d: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.assessment.create.source_i: Source array: sourceType defaults to S3 and supports S3, OSS, COS, OBS, OOS, or ZOS; endpoint starts with http:// or https://; sourceBucketType defaults to Bucket and supports Bucket, Folder, or Prefix with the corresponding single folder or prefix.
parameter.zos.assessment.delete.region.d: Region ID used to scope the request.
Results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.zos.assessment.list.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.assessment.pause.region.de: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.assessment.resume.region.d: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.assessment.show.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.assessment.start.region.de: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-acl.set.access_cont: Owner-and-grants access policy; do not supply it with ACL.
parameter.zos.bucket-acl.set.acl.descrip: Canned bucket ACL: private or public-read; do not supply it with accessControlPolicy.
parameter.zos.bucket-acl.set.region.desc: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-acl.show.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-cors.set.cors_confi: CORSRules object with origins, headers, exposed headers, maximum age, and methods limited to GET, PUT, DELETE, HEAD, or POST.
parameter.zos.bucket-cors.set.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-cors.show.region.de: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-encryption.delete.r: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-encryption.set.regi: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-encryption.set.serv: Encryption configuration whose rules use SSEAlgorithm AES256 or aws:kms and may supply KMSMasterKeyID for aws:kms.
parameter.zos.bucket-encryption.show.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-event-bridge.set.bu: Whether the bucket-level event bridge is enabled.
parameter.zos.bucket-event-bridge.set.re: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-lifecycle.delete.re: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-lifecycle.set.lifec: Lifecycle rules with Enabled or Disabled status; date/day alternatives are mutually exclusive, each rule needs an expiration or transition action, and transition storage is GLACIER or STANDARD_IA.
parameter.zos.bucket-lifecycle.set.regio: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-lifecycle.show.regi: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-logging.delete.regi: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-logging.set.bucket_: Logging configuration with target bucket and prefix; grant permission is FULL_CONTROL, WRITE, WRITE_ACP, READ, or READ_ACP.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-logging.show.region: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-object-lock.set.day: Retention duration in days; supply exactly one of days and years.
parameter.zos.bucket-object-lock.set.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-object-lock.set.yea: Retention duration in years; supply exactly one of days and years.
parameter.zos.bucket-object-lock.show.re: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-policy.delete.regio: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-policy.set.policy.d: Bucket policy as a JSON document string.
parameter.zos.bucket-policy.set.region.d: Region ID used to scope the request.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-quota.set.enabled.d: Whether quota enforcement is enabled; default is false. When true, maxSizeKb or maxObjects must be at least zero.
parameter.zos.bucket-quota.set.max_objec: Maximum number of objects allowed by the bucket quota; a negative or omitted value is unlimited.
parameter.zos.bucket-quota.set.max_size_: Maximum bucket capacity in KB; a negative or omitted value is unlimited.
parameter.zos.bucket-quota.set.region.de: Region ID used to scope the request.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-replication.list-de: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-replication.list.pa: Legacy page number; default is 1 and pageNo takes precedence when both are supplied.
Page number; default is 1 and it takes precedence over page.
Results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.zos.bucket-replication.list.re: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-replication.set.his: Whether existing historical objects are replicated; default is true.
parameter.zos.bucket-replication.set.plo: Whether source deletions are replicated; default is false.
parameter.zos.bucket-replication.set.pre: Object-key prefixes to replicate; default is an empty array, which replicates every object.
parameter.zos.bucket-replication.set.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-replication.show-pr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-statistics.show.end: UTC statistics end hour in YYYYMMDD-HH format.
parameter.zos.bucket-statistics.show.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-statistics.show.sta: UTC statistics start hour in YYYYMMDD-HH format.
parameter.zos.bucket-tag.delete.region.d: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-tag.list.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-tag.set.region.desc: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-tag.set.tagging.des: Tag-set object whose tagSet entries each contain key and value.
parameter.zos.bucket-versioning.set.regi: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket-versioning.set.vers: Versioning configuration whose status is Enabled or Suspended.
parameter.zos.bucket-versioning.show.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket.check-access.region: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket.create.acl.descript: Bucket ACL: private or public-read; default is private.
parameter.zos.bucket.create.az_policy.de: Availability-zone policy: single-az or multi-az; default is single-az.
parameter.zos.bucket.create.bucket.descr: Bucket name of 3-63 letters, digits, dots, or hyphens; punctuation cannot begin or end the name or be adjacent, and an IP address is not allowed.
parameter.zos.bucket.create.cmk_uuid.des: KMS key ID; isEncrypted must be true when supplied. Enabling encryption without a key creates one automatically.
parameter.zos.bucket.create.labels.descr: Array of bucket labels; each item contains a key and value.
parameter.zos.bucket.create.other_bucket: Additional bucket settings; ObjectLockEnabledForBucket enables object locking at creation time.
parameter.zos.bucket.create.project_id.d: Enterprise project ID; default is 0 for the default project.
parameter.zos.bucket.create.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket.create.storage_type: Bucket storage type: STANDARD, STANDARD_IA, or GLACIER; default is STANDARD.
parameter.zos.bucket.delete.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket.list.page_size.desc: Results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.zos.bucket.list.region.descrip: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket.show-fragment-count: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket.show-location.regio: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket.show-object-count.r: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.bucket.show.region.descrip: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.credential.show.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.directory.create.region.de: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.directory.delete.region.de: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.migration-agent.create.age: Unique 4-32 character agent name containing letters, digits, hyphens, or underscores.
parameter.zos.migration-agent.create.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.migration-agent.delete.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.migration-agent.list.agent: Agent status: unregistered, disconnected, connected, or expired.
parameter.zos.migration-agent.list.page_: Results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.zos.migration-agent.list.regio: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.migration-agent.show-regis: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.migration-failed-object.li: Results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
Region ID used to scope the request.
Destination ACL: match-resource, private, or public-read; default is match-resource.
parameter.zos.migration.create.conflict_: Same-name handling: OVERWRITE, IGNORE, or COMPARE; default is IGNORE.
parameter.zos.migration.create.destinati: ZOS destination array with an http:// or https:// endpoint, bucket, access key, and secret key.
parameter.zos.migration.create.migrate_e: Upper LastModified bound in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format, from 1970-01-02 through 2037-12-31 and later than migrateStartTime; dynamic default is task creation time plus ten years.
parameter.zos.migration.create.migrate_s: Lower LastModified bound in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format, from 1970-01-02 through 2037-12-31 and earlier than migrateEndTime.
parameter.zos.migration.create.migration: Connected agent ID required for semi-managed mode; the agent needs at least one available worker.
Migration mode: fully-managed or semi-managed; default is fully-managed.
Unique 4-32 character migration name containing letters, digits, hyphens, or underscores.
parameter.zos.migration.create.region.de: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.migration.create.source_in: Source array: sourceType defaults to S3 and supports S3, OSS, COS, OBS, OOS, or ZOS; endpoint starts with http:// or https://; sourceBucketType defaults to Bucket and supports Bucket, Folder, Files, or Prefix with at most one folder, 100 files, or one prefix.
parameter.zos.migration.create.storage_t: Destination storage: MATCH_RESOURCE, STANDARD, STANDARD_IA, or GLACIER; default is STANDARD. Archived source data must remain restored through migration when matching source storage.
parameter.zos.migration.delete.region.de: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.migration.list.migration_s: Migration status: creating, created, create_failed, starting, waiting, executing, stopping, stopped, restoring, agent_lost, finished, failed, finished_error, retrying, or deleting.
parameter.zos.migration.list.page_size.d: Results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.zos.migration.list.region.desc: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.migration.pause.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.migration.resume.region.de: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.migration.retry.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.migration.show-history.pag: Results per page, from 1 to 10; default is 10.
parameter.zos.migration.show-history.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.migration.show.region.desc: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.migration.start.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.multipart-fragment.list.pa: Legacy page number; default is 1 and pageNo takes precedence when both are supplied.
Page number; default is 1 and it takes precedence over page.
Fragments per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.zos.multipart-fragment.list.re: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.multipart-upload-part.list: Maximum returned parts; default and upper limit are 1000.
Part number after which listing begins.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.zos.multipart-upload.abort.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
